course_expected_weights._note: TPC River Highlands: Par-70, 6820y, short birdie-fest on bentgrass. APP dominant (150-200y fairway bucket = 0.24 of shots). PUTT elevated on fast bentgrass (stimp 12.0). ARG moderate — light rough (0.95") means fewer scrambling penalties but still counts. OTT slightly depressed — accuracy and placement matter more than raw distance on this short layout. Course in COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY (event_id=34); Apollo will use approach bucket weights directly.
